conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time or renewed or
for driving licences of categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E

exception.description: For category AM, the medical examination is required only if so required by the Member State in accordance with Article 10(1), point (b)

task.label: require a medical examination for driving licences of categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E

conditions.condition: regardless of whether a medical examination was undertaken for another driving licence category

task.label: require the applicant or holder of the driving licence to fill in a self-assessment form covering the medical conditions

conditions.condition: for driving licence categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE
notwithstanding paragraphs 1 and 2
to the extent not otherwise provided for by Annex III (e.g. appropriate assessment of eyesight under Annex III, point 3, is excluded)

task.label: fill in a self-assessment form covering the medical conditions

conditions.condition: for driving licence categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE
if required instead of a medical examination
to the extent not otherwise provided for by Annex III (e.g. appropriate assessment of eyesight under Annex III, point 3, is excluded)

task.label: establish a national system of assessment of fitness to drive

conditions.condition: for driving licence categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE
instead of a medical examination
to the extent not otherwise provided for by Annex III (e.g. appropriate assessment of eyesight under Annex III, point 3, is excluded)
applicable after the driving licence has been issued following a prior medical examination or self-assessment

task.label: provide for appropriate measures to address non-compliance

conditions.condition: for non-compliance with the requirement to fill in a self-assessment form or
for knowingly providing information in the self-assessment form that is incorrect or incomplete or
for failing to meet any requirement established in accordance with paragraph 3, point (b)

task.label: apply the national system of assessment of fitness to drive to monitor of fitness to drive during periods of administrative validity

conditions.condition: where the Member State has established a national system of assessment of fitness to drive

task.label: ensure that the applicant or holder of a driving licence undergoes a medical examination

conditions.condition: if it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder of a driving licence is likely to have one or more of the medical conditions listed in Annex III

task.label: take measures to raise awareness of the health sector and of driving licence holders about the minimum standards of physical and mental fitness
improve the knowledge of the health sector and of driving licence holders about the minimum standards of physical and mental fitness
adopt guidelines for medical practitioners to help identify driving licence holders who no longer meet the minimum standards of physical and mental fitness to drive
inform the Commission of guidelines adopted

conditions.condition: if the Member State adopts guidelines for medical practitioners to help identify driving licence holders who no longer meet the minimum standards of physical and mental fitness to drive

task.label: make available to the other Member States the guidelines adopted

conditions.condition: upon being informed by a Member State of the adoption of such guidelines

task.label: develop public awareness campaigns to inform citizens about mental or physical health conditions that may impair fitness to drive
inform the Commission of any public awareness campaigns developed

conditions.condition: if the Member State develops public awareness campaigns to inform citizens about mental or physical health conditions that may impair fitness to drive

task.label: make available to the other Member States the information concerning public awareness campaigns developed

conditions.condition: upon being informed by a Member State of such public awareness campaigns pursuant to paragraph 7

task.label: set standards stricter than those set out in Annex III for the issuance or any subsequent renewal of driving licences
